sentence_reviews.text: An encoder or latent representation is trained to preserve enough information to rebuild an input.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes abstract lines 37-39; VQ-VAE abstract lines 37-40 describes encoders, discrete representations, and generation from learned representations.
sentence_reviews.notes: Autoencoding objectives train latent encodings/representations to support reconstruction or generation of inputs.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Reconstruction objectives is to connect Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling to downstream capabilities including Autoencoders, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: VAE abstract lines 37-39; VQ-VAE abstract lines 37-40.
sentence_reviews.notes: Sources directly support VAE/VQ-VAE and unsupervised/generative representation learning, but the exact graph bridge wording is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Auto-Encoding Variational Bayes title line 31 and abstract lines 37-39.
sentence_reviews.notes: Autoencoders are the direct canonical use case for reconstruction objectives.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: VQ-VAE abstract lines 37-40 describes discrete codes and learned discrete representations.
sentence_reviews.notes: VQ-VAE learns discrete latent codes using an autoencoding formulation.

sentence_reviews.text: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: VQ-VAE abstract lines 37-40; VAE abstract lines 37-40.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; the surrogate limitation needs a more direct source.

sentence_reviews.text: Reconstruction objectives uses Unsupervised learning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: VQ-VAE abstract lines 37-40 states learning useful representations without supervision and discrete representations.
sentence_reviews.notes: Reconstruction objectives commonly use the input itself as target without labels.

sentence_reviews.text: Reconstruction objectives uses Generative modeling as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: VAE abstract lines 37-39; VQ-VAE abstract lines 37-40.
sentence_reviews.notes: VAEs and VQ-VAEs are generative models, but reconstruction objectives can also be used non-generatively.

sentence_reviews.text: Reconstruction objectives uses Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML landing page lines 45-48 describes computational/theoretical ML foundations, but not tensors specifically in the inspected excerpt.
sentence_reviews.notes: Inputs, latents, and reconstructions are typically tensor-valued, but the inspected evidence is indirect.

edge_reviews.notes: Learning representations without supervision is directly supported for VQ-VAE-style reconstruction objectives.
Generative modeling is core for VAEs/VQ-VAEs, but reconstruction objectives are broader.
Tensor representations are common implementation substrates but not directly evidenced by inspected sources.
